reason: Node 1.3.1 explicitly verifies that 'the hypotheses of Nodes 1.1 and 1.2 are satisfied,' yet it declares no dependencies on Nodes 1.1 or 1.2. This is a structural error: a hypothesis-verification node must depend on the nodes whose hypotheses it is checking, so that changes to those nodes' statements trigger re-verification. Dependencies on 1.1 and 1.2 should be declared explicitly.
